title: Mérida, Yucatán — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mérida, Yucatán: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mérida is a city in Yucatán with a population of 1,034,982. The cultural capital of the Yucatán Peninsula with colonial charm, Mayan heritage, and a growing expat community.

Last updated: July 10, 2026
